title: Demon Slayer GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off Demon Slayer.

# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga Demon Slayer. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with all the favourite characters and of course the mc Tanjiro Kamado.

## Recommended Modpack
- [**Kimetsu_no_yaiba (Demon slayer)**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kimetsunoyaiba)

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
